    90→sealed class Screen(val route: String, val label: String, val icon: ImageVector) {
    91→    object Home : Screen("home", "Home", Icons.Default.Home)
    92→    object Classes : Screen("classes", "Classes", Icons.Default.DateRange)
    93→    object Bus : Screen("bus", "Bus", Icons.Default.LocationOn)
    94→    object Weather : Screen("weather", "Weather", Icons.Default.Cloud)
    95→    object AddEdit : Screen("add_edit", "Add/Edit", Icons.Default.Add)
    96→    object Notifications : Screen("notifications", "Alerts", Icons.Default.Notifications)
    97→    object CourseDetail : Screen("course_detail/{entryId}", "", Icons.Default.DateRange) {
    98→        fun routeFor(entryId: String) = "course_detail/$entryId"
    99→    }
   100→    object EditEntry : Screen("edit_entry/{entryId}", "", Icons.Default.Add) {
   101→        fun routeFor(entryId: String) = "edit_entry/$entryId"
   102→    }
   103→}
   104→
   105→val bottomNavItems = listOf(
   106→    Screen.Home,
   107→    Screen.Classes,
   108→    Screen.Bus,
   109→    Screen.AddEdit,
   110→    Screen.Weather,
   111→    Screen.Notifications
   112→)

   114→class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
   115→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
   116→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
   117→        enableEdgeToEdge()
   118→        setContent {
   119→            Combined_scheduleTheme {
   120→                AppNavigation()
   121→            }
   122→        }
   123→    }
   124→}

   126→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
   127→@Composable
   128→fun AppNavigation() {
   129→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   130→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   131→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   132→    val isDetailScreen = currentDestination?.route?.startsWith("course_detail") == true
   133→        || currentDestination?.route?.startsWith("edit_entry") == true
   134→
   135→    val context = LocalContext.current
   136→    val searchVm: SearchViewModel = viewModel(
   137→        factory = SearchViewModel.Factory(context.applicationContext as android.app.Application)
   138→    )
   139→    val query by searchVm.query.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   140→    val isSearching by searchVm.isSearching.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   141→    val searchResults by searchVm.results.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   142→    val agentState by searchVm.agentState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   143→
   144→    BackHandler(enabled = isSearching) { searchVm.closeSearch() }
   145→
   146→    Scaffold(
   147→        topBar = {
   148→            if (!isDetailScreen) {
   149→                TopAppBar(
   150→                    title = {
   151→                        if (isSearching) {
   152→                            SearchField(
   153→                                query = query,
   154→                                onQueryChange = searchVm::onQueryChange
   155→                            )
   156→                        } else {
   157→                            Text(
   158→                                "CombinedSchedule",
   159→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   160→                                fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   161→                            )
   162→                        }
   163→                    },
   164→                    navigationIcon = {
   165→                        if (isSearching) {
   166→                            IconButton(onClick = searchVm::closeSearch) {
   167→                                Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "Close search")
   168→                            }
   169→                        }
   170→                    },
   171→                    actions = {
   172→                        if (isSearching) {
   173→                            if (query.isNotEmpty()) {
   174→                                IconButton(onClick = { searchVm.onQueryChange("") }) {
   175→                                    Icon(Icons.Default.Clear, contentDescription = "Clear")
   176→                                }
   177→                            }
   178→                        } else {
   179→                            IconButton(onClick = searchVm::openSearch) {
   180→                                Icon(Icons.Default.Search, contentDescription = "Search")
   181→                            }
   182→                        }
   183→                    },
   184→                    colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
   185→                        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   186→                    )
   187→                )
   188→            }
   189→        },
   190→        bottomBar = {
   191→            if (!isDetailScreen) NavigationBar {
   192→                bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   193→                    NavigationBarItem(
   194→                        icon = { Icon(screen.icon, contentDescription = screen.label) },
   195→                        label = { Text(screen.label) },
   196→                        selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true,
   197→                        onClick = {
   198→                            searchVm.closeSearch()
   199→                            navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   200→                                popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   201→                                    saveState = true
   202→                                }
   203→                                launchSingleTop = true
   204→                                restoreState = true
   205→                            }
   206→                        }
   207→                    )
   208→                }
   209→            }
   210→        }
   211→    ) { innerPadding ->
   212→        Box(modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)) {
   213→            NavHost(
   214→                navController = navController,
   215→                startDestination = Screen.Home.route
   216→            ) {
   217→                composable(Screen.Home.route) {
   218→                    HomeScreen(
   219→                        onNavigateToAddEdit = {
   220→                            navController.navigate(Screen.AddEdit.route) {
   221→                                launchSingleTop = true
   222→                            }
   223→                        },
   224→                        onNavigateToNotifications = {
   225→                            navController.navigate(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   226→                                launchSingleTop = true
   227→                            }
   228→                        },
   229→                        onCourseClick = { entry ->
   230→                            navController.navigate(Screen.CourseDetail.routeFor(entry.id))
   231→                        },
   232→                        onEditEntry = { entryId ->
   233→                            navController.navigate(Screen.EditEntry.routeFor(entryId))
   234→                        }
   235→                    )
   236→                }
   237→                composable(Screen.Classes.route) { ClassScheduleScreen() }
   238→                composable(Screen.Bus.route) { BusScheduleScreen() }
   239→                composable(Screen.Weather.route) { WeatherScreen() }
   240→                composable(Screen.AddEdit.route) { AddEditEntryScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }) }
   241→                composable(Screen.Notifications.route) { NotificationSettingsScreen() }
   242→                composable(
   243→                    route = Screen.CourseDetail.route,
   244→                    arguments = listOf(navArgument("entryId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   245→                ) { backStackEntry ->
   246→                    val entryId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("entryId") ?: return@composable
   247→                    CourseDetailScreen(
   248→                        entryId = entryId,
   249→                        onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
   250→                    )
   251→                }
   252→                composable(
   253→                    route = Screen.EditEntry.route,
   254→                    arguments = listOf(navArgument("entryId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   255→                ) { backStackEntry ->
   256→                    val entryId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("entryId") ?: return@composable
   257→                    AddEditEntryScreen(
   258→                        entryId = entryId,
   259→                        onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
   260→                    )
   261→                }
   262→            }
   263→
   264→            // Search results overlay
   265→            if (isSearching) {
   266→                SearchResultsOverlay(
   267→                    query = query,
   268→                    results = searchResults,
   269→                    agentState = agentState,
   270→                    onAskAgent = searchVm::askAgent,
   271→                    onEntryClick = { entry ->
   272→                        searchVm.closeSearch()
   273→                        navController.navigate(Screen.CourseDetail.routeFor(entry.id))
   274→                    },
   275→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
   276→                )
   277→            }
   278→        }
   279→    }
   280→}

   282→@Composable
   283→private fun SearchField(query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit) {
   284→    val focusRequester = remember { FocusRequester() }
   285→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) { focusRequester.requestFocus() }
   286→
   287→    TextField(
   288→        value = query,
   289→        onValueChange = onQueryChange,
   290→        placeholder = { Text("Search schedule and assignments…") },
   291→        singleLine = true,
   292→        modifier = Modifier
   293→            .fillMaxWidth()
   294→            .focusRequester(focusRequester),
   295→        colors = TextFieldDefaults.colors(
   296→            focusedContainerColor = Color.Transparent,
   297→            unfocusedContainerColor = Color.Transparent,
   298→            focusedIndicatorColor = Color.Transparent,
   299→            unfocusedIndicatorColor = Color.Transparent
   300→        )
   301→    )
   302→}
   303→
   304→@Composable
   305→private fun SearchResultsOverlay(
   306→    query: String,
   307→    results: List<SearchResult>,
   308→    agentState: AgentState,
   309→    onAskAgent: () -> Unit,
   310→    onEntryClick: (HomeEntry) -> Unit,
   311→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   312→) {
   313→    Surface(
   314→        modifier = modifier,
   315→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background
   316→    ) {
   317→        if (query.isBlank()) {
   318→            Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), contentAlignment = Alignment.Center) {
   319→                Text(
   320→                    "Type to search…",
   321→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   322→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   323→                )
   324→            }
   325→        } else {
   326→            LazyColumn {
   327→                // ── AI Agent card ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   328→                item {
   329→                    AgentCard(
   330→                        agentState = agentState,
   331→                        onAskAgent = onAskAgent,
   332→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp)
   333→                    )
   334→                    HorizontalDivider(color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant)
   335→                }
   336→
   337→                // ── Local results ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   338→                if (results.isEmpty()) {
   339→                    item {
   340→                        Box(
   341→                            modifier = Modifier
   342→                                .fillMaxWidth()
   343→                                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 20.dp),
   344→                            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   345→                        ) {
   346→                            Text(
   347→                                "No schedule or assignment matches for \"$query\"",
   348→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   349→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   350→                            )
   351→                        }
   352→                    }
   353→                } else {
   354→                    items(results) { result ->
   355→                        when (result) {
   356→                            is SearchResult.EntryResult ->
   357→                                EntrySearchItem(result.entry, onClick = { onEntryClick(result.entry) })
   358→                            is SearchResult.WorkResult ->
   359→                                WorkSearchItem(result.work)
   360→                        }
   361→                        HorizontalDivider(color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant)
   362→                    }
   363→                }
   364→            }
   365→        }
   366→    }
   367→}
   368→
   369→@Composable
   370→private fun AgentCard(
   371→    agentState: AgentState,
   372→    onAskAgent: () -> Unit,
   373→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   374→) {
   375→    Card(
   376→        modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   377→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   378→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer
   379→        )
   380→    ) {
   381→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)) {
   382→            Row(
   383→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   384→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   385→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   386→            ) {
   387→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   388→                    Icon(
   389→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.AutoAwesome,
   390→                        contentDescription = null,
   391→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer,
   392→                        modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   393→                    )
   394→                    Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   395→                    Text(
   396→                        "AI Assistant",
   397→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
   398→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   399→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   400→                    )
   401→                }
   402→                when (agentState) {
   403→                    is AgentState.Idle -> {
   404→                        Button(
   405→                            onClick = onAskAgent,
   406→                            colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   407→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   408→                            )
   409→                        ) {
   410→                            Text("Ask", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium)
   411→                        }
   412→                    }
   413→                    is AgentState.Loading -> {
   414→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   415→                            modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   416→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp,
   417→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   418→                        )
   419→                    }
   420→                    is AgentState.Answer -> {
   421→                        Button(
   422→                            onClick = onAskAgent,
   423→                            colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   424→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   425→                            )
   426→                        ) {
   427→                            Text("Ask again", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium)
   428→                        }
   429→                    }
   430→                }
   431→            }
   432→
   433→            if (agentState is AgentState.Answer) {
   434→                Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   435→                Text(
   436→                    text = agentState.text,
   437→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   438→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   439→                )
   440→            }
   441→        }
   442→    }
   443→}
   444→
   445→@Composable
   446→private fun EntrySearchItem(entry: HomeEntry, onClick: () -> Unit) {
   447→    Row(
   448→        modifier = Modifier
   449→            .fillMaxWidth()
   450→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
   451→            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   452→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   453→    ) {
   454→        Text(
   455→            text = if (entry.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   456→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   457→            modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   458→        )
   459→        Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   460→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   461→            Text(
   462→                text = entry.title,
   463→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   464→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   465→                maxLines = 1,
   466→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   467→            )
   468→            val sub = buildList {
   469→                if (entry.location.isNotEmpty()) add(entry.location)
   470→                add(entry.daysOfWeek.joinToString(", "))
   471→            }.joinToString(" · ")
   472→            Text(
   473→                text = sub,
   474→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   475→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   476→            )
   477→        }
   478→        Text(
   479→            text = "Schedule",
   480→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   481→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   482→        )
   483→    }
   484→}
   485→
   486→@Composable
   487→private fun WorkSearchItem(work: Work) {
   488→    Row(
   489→        modifier = Modifier
   490→            .fillMaxWidth()
   491→            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   492→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   493→    ) {
   494→        Text(
   495→            text = "📝",
   496→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   497→            modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   498→        )
   499→        Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   500→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   501→            Text(
   502→                text = work.title,
   503→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   504→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   505→                maxLines = 1,
   506→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   507→            )
   508→            Text(
   509→                text = work.courseTitle + if (work.dueDate.isNotEmpty()) " · Due ${work.dueDate}" else "",
   510→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   511→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   512→            )
   513→        }
   514→        Text(
   515→            text = if (work.isCompleted) "Done" else "Assignment",
   516→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   517→            color = if (work.isCompleted)
   518→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   519→            else
   520→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   521→        )
   522→    }
   523→}

     3→import android.app.Application
     4→import androidx.lifecycle.AndroidViewModel
     5→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider
     6→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
     7→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.AgentRepository
     8→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.AppDatabase
     9→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.HomeEntry
    10→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.Work
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    12→import kotlinx.coroutines.FlowPreview
    13→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    14→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    15→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
    16→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.debounce
    17→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.distinctUntilChanged
    18→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    19→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    20→
    21→sealed class SearchResult {
    22→    data class EntryResult(val entry: HomeEntry) : SearchResult()
    23→    data class WorkResult(val work: Work) : SearchResult()
    24→}
    25→
    26→sealed class AgentState {
    27→    object Idle : AgentState()
    28→    object Loading : AgentState()
    29→    data class Answer(val text: String) : AgentState()
    30→}
    31→
    32→@OptIn(FlowPreview::class)
    33→class SearchViewModel(app: Application) : AndroidViewModel(app) {
    34→
    35→    private val db = AppDatabase.getInstance(app)
    36→
    37→    private val _query = MutableStateFlow("")
    38→    val query: StateFlow<String> = _query.asStateFlow()
    39→
    40→    private val _results = MutableStateFlow<List<SearchResult>>(emptyList())
    41→    val results: StateFlow<List<SearchResult>> = _results.asStateFlow()
    42→
    43→    private val _isSearching = MutableStateFlow(false)
    44→    val isSearching: StateFlow<Boolean> = _isSearching.asStateFlow()
    45→
    46→    private val _agentState = MutableStateFlow<AgentState>(AgentState.Idle)
    47→    val agentState: StateFlow<AgentState> = _agentState.asStateFlow()
    48→
    49→    init {
    50→        viewModelScope.launch {
    51→            _query
    52→                .debounce(200)
    53→                .distinctUntilChanged()
    54→                .collect { q ->
    55→                    if (q.isBlank()) {
    56→                        _results.value = emptyList()
    57→                        _agentState.value = AgentState.Idle
    58→                    } else {
    59→                        val entries = db.homeEntryDao().search(q)
    60→                            .map { SearchResult.EntryResult(it) }
    61→                        val works = db.workDao().search(q)
    62→                            .map { SearchResult.WorkResult(it) }
    63→                        _results.value = entries + works
    64→                    }
    65→                }
    66→        }
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    fun onQueryChange(q: String) {
    70→        _query.value = q
    71→    }
    72→
    73→    /** Ask the AI agent using the current query and full DB context. */
    74→    fun askAgent() {
    75→        val q = _query.value.trim()
    76→        if (q.isBlank()) return
    77→
    78→        _agentState.value = AgentState.Loading
    79→        viewModelScope.launch {
    80→            val allEntries = db.homeEntryDao().getAllList()
    81→            val allWorks = db.workDao().getAllList()
    82→            val answer = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    83→                try {
    84→                    AgentRepository.ask(q, allEntries, allWorks)
    85→                } catch (e: Exception) {
    86→                    "Error: ${e.message}"
    87→                }
    88→            }
    89→            _agentState.value = AgentState.Answer(answer)
    90→        }
    91→    }
    92→
    93→    fun openSearch() {
    94→        _isSearching.value = true
    95→    }
    96→
    97→    fun closeSearch() {
    98→        _isSearching.value = false
    99→        _query.value = ""
   100→        _results.value = emptyList()
   101→        _agentState.value = AgentState.Idle
   102→    }
   103→
   104→    class Factory(private val app: Application) : ViewModelProvider.Factory {
   105→        @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
   106→        override fun <T : androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel> create(modelClass: Class<T>): T =
   107→            SearchViewModel(app) as T
   108→    }
   109→}

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.data
     2→
     3→import com.example.combined_schedule.BuildConfig
     4→import com.google.gson.JsonArray
     5→import com.google.gson.JsonObject
     6→import com.google.gson.JsonParser
     7→import java.io.OutputStreamWriter
     8→import java.net.HttpURLConnection
     9→import java.net.URL
    10→
    11→object AgentRepository {
    12→
    13→    private const val API_URL = "https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages"
    14→    private const val MODEL = "claude-opus-4-6"
    15→
    16→    /**
    17→     * Ask the AI agent a question about the user's schedule and assignments.
    18→     * Returns the agent's text reply, or an error message on failure.
    19→     */
    20→    fun ask(
    21→        query: String,
    22→        entries: List<HomeEntry>,
    23→        works: List<Work>
    24→    ): String {
    25→        val apiKey = BuildConfig.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
    26→        if (apiKey.isBlank() || apiKey == "YOUR_KEY_HERE") return noKeyMessage()
    27→
    28→        val systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(entries, works)
    29→        val body = buildRequestBody(systemPrompt, query)
    30→
    31→        val conn = URL(API_URL).openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
    32→        conn.requestMethod = "POST"
    33→        conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "application/json")
    34→        conn.setRequestProperty("x-api-key", apiKey)
    35→        conn.setRequestProperty("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
    36→        conn.connectTimeout = 15_000
    37→        conn.readTimeout = 15_000
    38→        conn.doOutput = true
    39→
    40→        OutputStreamWriter(conn.outputStream, Charsets.UTF_8).use { it.write(body) }
    41→
    42→        val responseCode = conn.responseCode
    43→        val responseText = if (responseCode == 200) {
    44→            conn.inputStream.bufferedReader().readText()
    45→        } else {
    46→            conn.errorStream?.bufferedReader()?.readText() ?: "HTTP $responseCode"
    47→        }
    48→
    49→        if (responseCode != 200) return "Agent error ($responseCode). Check your API key."
    50→
    51→        return parseTextContent(responseText)
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    internal fun buildSystemPrompt(entries: List<HomeEntry>, works: List<Work>): String {
    55→        val scheduleLines = if (entries.isEmpty()) {
    56→            "No schedule entries today."
    57→        } else {
    58→            entries.joinToString("\n") { e ->
    59→                "- ${e.title} at ${e.time}" +
    60→                    (if (e.location.isNotEmpty()) " (${e.location})" else "") +
    61→                    " [${e.daysOfWeek.joinToString(",")}]"
    62→            }
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        val pendingWorks = works.filter { !it.isCompleted }
    66→        val workLines = if (pendingWorks.isEmpty()) {
    67→            "No pending assignments."
    68→        } else {
    69→            pendingWorks.joinToString("\n") { w ->
    70→                "- \"${w.title}\" for ${w.courseTitle}" +
    71→                    (if (w.dueDate.isNotEmpty()) " due ${w.dueDate}" else "")
    72→            }
    73→        }
    74→
    75→        return """You are a helpful assistant embedded in a student schedule app.
    76→You have access to the student's current schedule entries and pending assignments.
    77→Answer questions concisely — 1-3 sentences. If the student asks about something
    78→not in their data, say so briefly.
    79→
    80→SCHEDULE ENTRIES:
    81→$scheduleLines
    82→
    83→PENDING ASSIGNMENTS:
    84→$workLines"""
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    internal fun buildRequestBody(systemPrompt: String, userQuery: String): String {
    88→        val message = JsonObject().apply {
    89→            addProperty("role", "user")
    90→            addProperty("content", userQuery)
    91→        }
    92→        val messages = JsonArray().apply { add(message) }
    93→        return JsonObject().apply {
    94→            addProperty("model", MODEL)
    95→            addProperty("max_tokens", 512)
    96→            addProperty("system", systemPrompt)
    97→            add("messages", messages)
    98→        }.toString()
    99→    }
   100→
   101→    internal fun parseTextContent(json: String): String {
   102→        val root = JsonParser.parseString(json).asJsonObject
   103→        val content = root.getAsJsonArray("content")
   104→        for (element in content) {
   105→            val block = element.asJsonObject
   106→            if (block.get("type")?.asString == "text") {
   107→                return block.get("text").asString.trim()
   108→            }
   109→        }
   110→        return "No response from agent."
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    private fun noKeyMessage() =
   114→        "AI agent not configured. Add your Anthropic API key to local.properties."
   115→}
   116→

Build successful. Here's a summary of what was done:

**What changed:**

1. **`AgentRepository.kt`** — Replaced the Anthropic API with Ollama's local API:
   - URL: `http://10.0.2.2:11434/api/chat` (the emulator's alias for your Mac's localhost)
   - Model: `llama3.2` (the one you already have)
   - Uses Ollama's `/api/chat` format with `stream: false`
   - No API key needed — it's all local

2. **`network_security_config.xml`** (new) — Allows cleartext HTTP traffic to `10.0.2.2`, since Android blocks HTTP by default and Ollama uses HTTP locally

   179→    // ── JSON response parsing ────────────────────────────────────────────────
   180→    // org.json is not available in JVM unit tests, so we build the JSON strings

   182→
   183→    private fun anthropicJson(vararg blocks: Pair<String, String>): String {
   184→        val contentArray = blocks.joinToString(",") { (type, value) ->
   185→            if (type == "text") """{"type":"text","text":"$value"}"""
   186→            else """{"type":"$type","$type":"$value"}"""
   187→        }
   188→        return """{"content":[$contentArray]}"""
   189→    }

   201→        assertEquals("Hello!", AgentRepository.parseTextContent(json))

   213→        assertEquals("No response from agent.", AgentRepository.parseTextContent(json))
   214→    }
